creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text: I tried a onestart on a couple other systems and it worked fine.  The one different I can think of that might affect rc scripts is the fact that the failing system was upgraded from 11.2 to 12.0 while the others are fresh installs.  I'm going to assume there's some sort of corruption on this system.  I'll poke around a little more and if I don't find anything, I'll try a fresh installation.  If I do find something, I'll report back here.
